description: Redesign Delivery Partner screens with premium dashboard, order flow, and real-time data
steps: Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/delivery_dashboard_screen.dart: greeting header with time-of-day (Good morning/afternoon), stats cards in a 2x2 grid with gradient backgrounds and icons (deliveries, cash, UPI, lifetime), active orders section with premium cards showing customer name/address/status badge/distance, alert health indicator card with green/red status icons, pull-to-refresh with animated indicator, shimmer loading for all sections, floating action button for quick actions

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/delivery_order_detail_screen.dart: status badge at top with colored background, customer info card (name, phone with call button, address with map icon), order items list with quantities, payment info (method + amount), action buttons at bottom (dynamic based on order status: Pickup/Report Damage/Collect Payment/Complete), navigation card with directions button, notes section if present

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/pickup_confirmation_screen.dart: order summary card, checklist of items to verify (checkboxes), photo upload placeholder area, confirm pickup button with loading state, back button

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/damage_report_screen.dart: item selection list with checkboxes, damage description text field, photo upload placeholder, severity selector (Minor/Major/Critical radio buttons with colored indicators), submit report button with loading state

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/collection_screen.dart: expected amount card (large number with gradient), payment method selector (Cash/UPI), actual collected amount input, discrepancy warning if amounts differ, confirm collection button

Completely redesign mobile/lib/features/delivery/presentation/completion_screen.dart: success animation/check mark (animated scaling green checkmark), delivery summary card, customer rating prompt (star rating), thank you message, back to dashboard button, confetti or celebration subtle animation
acceptance_criteria: Delivery dashboard has gradient stat cards in 2x2 grid
Dashboard has pull-to-refresh and shimmer loading
Order detail shows dynamic action buttons based on status
Pickup screen has item checklist with checkboxes
Damage report has severity selector with colored indicators
Collection screen shows expected amount prominently
Completion screen has animated success checkmark
All delivery screens handle API errors gracefully
verification: Verify delivery_dashboard_screen.dart has gradient stat cards
Verify delivery_order_detail_screen.dart has dynamic action buttons
Verify completion_screen.dart has animated check/success state
